marketing.also_available_in_pro.descript.message:
ESS Pro is the commercial backend distribution from Element.

It includes everything in ESS Community plus additional features and services that are tailored to professional environments with more than 100 users up to massive scale in the millions.

It is designed to support enterprise requirements in terms of advanced IAM, compliance, scalability, high availability and multi-tenancy.

marketing.auditing.description.message:
Auditing gives organizations the ability to keep records of end-to-end encrypted conversations and room events to meet compliance or legal requirements.

When enabled, it is visible to all end users which rooms are being recorded to ensure transparency of the auditing process.

Auditing can be configured to suit an organization’s specific requirements. For instance direct messages between two individuals can be excluded so that only group conversations are recorded.

Audit data is being stored as a stream of machine-readable events in the JSON format either on file storage or S3 and can be forwarded to log analyzer tooling for further filtering and analysis.

marketing.supervision.description.message:
Supervision enables an organisation to administer all rooms from a central point. A 'supervisor' account will join defined rooms with room admin privileges. Server administrators can seamlessly impersonate the account from the admin console to manage and supervise their rooms.

  • Manage rooms and their settings (name, topic, permissions, etc.)
  • Manage room memberships
  • Remove unwanted messages and uploaded media
  • Recover abandoned rooms (all users have left)
  • Supervisor account can or cannot read encrypted message contents (configurable)

pages.auditing.unavailable_alert.descrip.message: This feature is not available in ESS Community. Upgrade to ESS Pro to enable it.

pages.auditing.unavailable_alert.title.message: Auditing is a feature available in ESS Pro
